creator: shell@shellhung.org
text:
I am the maintainer of p5-Net-SSLeay port in OpenBSD Ports Tree,
I see there're new release of this port, and this port in FreeBSD
is currently un-maintained, so I did the upgrade, hope to maintain
the port.

Fix: 

The diff file for security/p5-Net-SSLeay can be download from :

 http://www.shellhung.org/FreeBSD/patches/p5-Net-SSLeay.diff

thanks
